shell.title: The Changemaker Compass
shell.subtitle: Personal growth planning — orientation over instruction.

capacity.title: Capacity & Resources
capacity.description: How much time, energy, and material support can you realistically dedicate to changemaking right now?
capacity.rateEach: Rate each dimension honestly — not where you wish you were, but where you are today.
capacity.timeDescription: How much discretionary time can you reliably allocate each week?
capacity.resourcesDescription: Financial, material, or logistical resources at your disposal.
capacity.bandwidthDescription: Your current cognitive and emotional capacity for taking on new commitments.
capacity.scopeSuggestionIntro: Based on your average score of {{avg}}, we suggest:

narrow.label: Narrow Scope
narrow.desc: Focus on one small, manageable experiment. Protect your energy.

moderate.label: Moderate Scope
moderate.desc: A balanced approach — enough to make progress without overcommitting.

active.label: Active Scope
active.desc: You have solid capacity across the board. Take on more ambitious experiments.

capacity.scopeAdjustPrompt: Adjust if needed — pick the scope that truly fits your life right now:
capacity.anyOrderPrivate: fill in any order, purely private
capacity.energyPatternHint: When are you at your best? When do you crash? What drains or recharges you?
capacity.riskFearsHint: What could go wrong? What scares you — and what would help you move anyway?
capacity.emotionalPatternHint: How do you typically respond under pressure or uncertainty?
capacity.emptyFieldsGaps: Empty fields reveal gaps — that's the point.
capacity.emptyFieldsNote: Empty fields aren't failures — they're invitations to grow your network.
capacity.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
capacity.selectScopeAbove: Select a scope above to continue
capacity.confirmScopeUnlock: Confirm scope and open next pillar

catalyst.title: Catalyst & Experimentation
catalyst.description: Design real-world experiments to test your changemaking hypotheses. You have {{count}} experiment slot(s).
catalyst.hypothesisPrompt: If I do X with Y, then something shifts — and here's how I'll check.
catalyst.actionPlaceholder: e.g., host a community dinner, start a skill-share circle
catalyst.peoplePlaceholder: e.g., my neighbors, local youth group, co-op members
catalyst.hypothesisPlaceholder: e.g., people will share contact info and form a loose network
catalyst.impactCheckHint: How will you know if it worked? What observable signal would confirm your hypothesis?
catalyst.impactPlaceholder: e.g., 3+ people exchange contacts, someone volunteers to organize the next one
catalyst.outcomePlaceholder: What actually occurred? Be honest — negative results are data too.
catalyst.imbalanceInfo: Which domains are growing, stable, or slipping? Erosion here is information, not failure.
catalyst.integritySignal: Integrity signal — one of your non-negotiables may be compromised
catalyst.integrityPrompt: Consider whether this experiment needs adjustment to protect what matters most.
catalyst.honestNotPolished: Be honest, not polished. These are for you.

story.whyPlaceholder: What's driving you at a gut level?
story.visionPlaceholder: What does success look like in your own words?
story.shiftLabel: The shift I'm trying to create
story.shiftPlaceholder: What change do you want to see in the world?

catalyst.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
catalyst.completeOneToSave: Complete at least one experiment to save

clarity.title: Clarity & Direction
clarity.description: Define the inner compass that guides your changemaking — your north star, boundaries, and origin story.
clarity.northStarPrompt: What is the change you most want to see in the world? Say it in your own words — a rough draft is perfect.
clarity.northStarPlaceholder: e.g., Everyone in my neighborhood has someone they can count on
clarity.valuesPrompt: What will you not compromise on, even under pressure? These are your red lines.
clarity.nonNegotiablePlaceholder: e.g., No work that exploits vulnerable people
clarity.originPrompt: What question or experience set you on this path? What keeps pulling you back?
clarity.originPlaceholder: e.g., Why do some communities thrive while others barely survive?
clarity.bioDescription: Map the experiences that shaped your changemaking DNA.
clarity.bioChoosePrompts: Choose the prompts that resonate — skip the rest.

bioPrompts.turning: A turning point that changed my direction
bioPrompts.proud: Something I did that I'm proud of
bioPrompts.failures: A failure that taught me something essential
bioPrompts.shapers: People or communities that shaped who I am

clarity.bioThreadPrompt: Look for the thread that connects these — that's your pattern.
clarity.lockedPillarsHint: Save this pillar to open the next one.
clarity.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
clarity.addNorthStarAndNonNegotiable: Add a north star and at least one non-negotiable

context.title: Context & Ecosystem
context.description: Map the people, power structures, and communication dynamics around your changemaking work.
context.ecosystemHint: Who surrounds your work? Name the people and groups in each ring.

sharers.label: Sharers
sharers.placeholder: e.g., a fellow organizer, a trusted advisor

gatekeepers.label: Gatekeepers
gatekeepers.placeholder: e.g., a funder, a local official, a board chair

affected.label: Affected
affected.placeholder: e.g., the families depending on this service

context.gapHint: Whose voice is absent from your map — and what would it take to include them?
context.translationHint: How is your work described by different audiences? Understanding these framings helps you communicate across boundaries.

trans.minePlaceholder: How I describe my work to myself
trans.alliesPlaceholder: How my allies or collaborators describe it
trans.powerPlaceholder: How decision-makers or funders would describe it

context.conflictHint: How do you typically show up in conflict? What pattern do you default to — and what would you prefer?
context.conflictPlaceholder: e.g., I tend to avoid conflict until it boils over…
context.commHint: What's your default communication style under pressure? What gets lost?
context.commPlaceholder: e.g., I over-explain when I'm nervous and skip the emotional core…
context.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

entry.introTitle: Where are you on the changemaking journey?
entry.introDescription: The Compass helps you find your place in the changemaking landscape. Choose the phase that fits, then pick your level. There are no wrong answers — only honest ones.

I.description: You're focused on building inner clarity, skills, and resilience before engaging externally. This is foundational work — getting your own house in order.
I.markers: Self-awareness, personal values, emotional patterns, skill-building

II.description: You're actively engaging with people and structures around you — mapping ecosystems, building relationships, and navigating power dynamics.
II.markers: Relationship mapping, stakeholder analysis, conflict navigation, coalition-building

III.description: You're integrating capacity, resources, and experimentation into a sustainable practice. The focus shifts from doing to being — making changemaking a way of life.
III.markers: Resource stewardship, experiment design, storytelling, systemic balance

entry.placementOptionalHint: This self-placement is optional but helps us tailor your Compass experience.
